isi.lyrics:
Lyric min seol - 손 (Coiling My Heart)

Romanization

chinjeolhame iksukhaejineun naega museowo
sunsuhan geu maeumkkajido ajik natseoreo

meolliseodo dugeunggeorimeun (gwaenchana jijiga ana)
injeonghago sipji aneun geol duryeoun maeumedo

neukkyeojineun sonui onggiga eoneu saengga momeul hwigama
hayaejineun meoritsok jeombu neoui sumgyeol Coiling My Heart
Coiling My Heart
Coiling My Heart

gijeogira mideowasseotdeon modeun sunggani
hanahana geudae songgiri daa isseosseo.

mureobol yonggiga eopseosseo. (gidaehaesseotdeon daedabeul)
eojjeomyeon deutji mothalkka bwa duryeoun maeumedo

neukkyeojineun sonui onggiga eoneu saengga momeul hwigama
hayaejineun meoritsok jeombu neoui sumgyeol Coiling My Heart
Coiling My Heart
Coiling My Heart

gyesok singgyeong sseuyeodo injeonghago sipji anteon
duryeoun maeum geu teumeuro

neukkyeojineun sonui onggiga eoneu saengga momeul hwigama
hayaejineun meoritsok jeombu neoui sumgyeol Coiling My Heart
Coiling My Heart
Coiling My Heart

Hangeul

친절함에 익숙해지는 내가 무서워
순수한 그 마음까지도 아직 낯설어

멀리서도 두근거림은 (괜찮아 지지가 않아)
인정하고 싶지 않은 걸 두려운 마음에도

느껴지는 손의 온기가 어느 샌가 몸을 휘감아
하얘지는 머릿속 전부 너의 숨결 Coiling My Heart
Coiling My Heart
Coiling My Heart

기적이라 믿어왔었던 모든 순간이
하나하나 그대 손길이 닿아 있었어.

물어볼 용기가 없었어. (기대했었던 대답을)
어쩌면 듣지 못할까 봐 두려운 마음에도

느껴지는 손의 온기가 어느 샌가 몸을 휘감아
하얘지는 머릿속 전부 너의 숨결 Coiling My Heart
Coiling My Heart
Coiling My Heart

계속 신경 쓰여도 인정하고 싶지 않던
두려운 마음 그 틈으로

느껴지는 손의 온기가 어느 샌가 몸을 휘감아
하얘지는 머릿속 전부 너의 숨결 Coiling My Heart
Coiling My Heart
Coiling My Heart

isi.lyrics:
Lyric PATZ - crossone’smind

Romanization

I feel a breath on the floor
Under me, humming light
The screen doors breathe in, silence low
Someone leaves, I don’t move


I see no one past the window
Shadows pull through the light
I feel the sound, but not the weight at all
The doors go on alone

Fall in slow, fade out
Leave it all behind
No way home now

Hangeul

I feel a breath on the floor
Under me, humming light
The screen doors breathe in, silence low
Someone leaves, I don’t move


I see no one past the window
Shadows pull through the light
I feel the sound, but not the weight at all
The doors go on alone

Fall in slow, fade out
Leave it all behind
No way home now
isi.lyrics_timestamp:
I feel a breath on the floor
Under me, humming light
The screen doors breathe in, silence low
Someone leaves, I don’t move


I see no one past the window
Shadows pull through the light
I feel the sound, but not the weight at all
The doors go on alone

Fall in slow, fade out
Leave it all behind
No way home now

isi.lyrics:
Lyric PATZ - We

Romanization

gyeopchyeojin kkum soge
arabol su eomneun saramdeul

kkeuteomneun jansange
modeun geol naeryeonogo gal geoya

geojit gateun
uriui bami hanaga doel ttae

muneojin gamjeongdeul
gipeojin maeumeul gajin chae

Inside
biwonaen kkeute namgyeojin na

ithyeojin teum saireul neomeo

Blame it on the rain
Run into the rain
We have a vision
We have a calling
Run it every day


Blame it on the rain
Run into the rain
Keep it to ourselves
Run into the rain
Run it every day

Hangeul

겹쳐진 꿈 속에
알아볼 수 없는 사람들

끝없는 잔상에
모든 걸 내려놓고 갈 거야

거짓 같은
우리의 밤이 하나가 될 때

무너진 감정들
깊어진 마음을 가진 채

Inside
비워낸 끝에 남겨진 나

잊혀진 틈 사이를 넘어

Blame it on the rain
Run into the rain
We have a vision
We have a calling
Run it every day


Blame it on the rain
Run into the rain
Keep it to ourselves
Run into the rain
Run it every day
